en_title: Destiny 2 Hits Highest Player Count in Two Years Following Final Update's Release, Shatters Marathon's All-Time Peak
cn_title: 《命运2》最终更新后玩家数创两年新高，远超《失落星船：马拉松》峰值
subtitle: 最后的狂欢
opus_summary: 《命运2》最终更新后Steam同时在线达16.7万，创2024年《终极形态》以来新高，远超《失落星船：马拉松》的7.7万峰值。玩家因不满Bungie停止支持而发起“冲爆服务器”活动。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 is seeing a massive resurgence with the release of its final update.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运2》在发布最终更新后，迎来了玩家数量的大幅回升。

paragraphs.en: Destiny fans have shown up in droves to send off the beloved sci-fi shooter. Although Destiny 2's servers will remain active for the foreseeable future, the game won't be getting any new content going forward. The game's final update was released today and at the time of writing, the game's 24-hour concurrent player count on Steam has peaked at 167,000. This is the highest Destiny 2 player count since the release of 2024's The Final Shape, the last paid expansion for the game, which peaked at 314,000 players.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运》粉丝们成群结队地前来告别这款备受喜爱的科幻射击游戏。尽管《命运2》的服务器在可预见的未来仍将保持运行，但游戏将不再获得任何新内容。游戏的最终更新于今日发布，截至撰稿时，该游戏在Steam上的24小时同时在线玩家数峰值达到了16.7万。这是自2024年《终极形态》资料片（该游戏的最后一个付费扩展包，峰值达31.4万玩家）发布以来，《命运2》的最高玩家数。

paragraphs.en: Some players have even been reporting that they're having troubles logging into Destiny 2 due to the sudden influx. Ahead of the update, fans were aiming to surpass the all-time peak of Marathon and crash Destiny 2's servers to show Bungie/Sony that Destiny should continue on. They've already blown past Marathon's all-time peak player count of 77,000 players, and it seems the campaign has been successful in creating instability in Destiny 2's servers. Given this has all happned in the middle of the workday in the United States, it'll be interesting to see if this rockets further in the evening or closer to the weekend.
paragraphs.cn: 一些玩家甚至报告称，由于玩家突然涌入，他们遇到了登录《命运2》困难的情况。在更新之前，粉丝们的目标是超越《失落星船：马拉松》的历史峰值，并挤爆《命运2》的服务器，以此向Bungie/索尼表明《命运》系列应该继续下去。他们已经轻松超过了《失落星船：马拉松》的7.7万玩家历史峰值，而且这场运动似乎成功地造成了《命运2》服务器的不稳定。考虑到这一切都发生在美国工作日的中间时段，看看晚上或临近周末时玩家数是否会进一步飙升，将会很有趣。

paragraphs.en: Last month, Bungie announced that support from Destiny 2 would be coming to an end in June , which caught fans off guard as many were expecting more expansions and updates. However, Bungie has chosen to focus its efforts on supporting Marathon, its latest release which has and has resulted in substantial losses for Sony, Bungie's parent company.
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，Bungie宣布《命运2》的支持将于6月结束，这让粉丝们措手不及，因为许多人原本期待会有更多的扩展包和更新。然而，Bungie选择将精力集中在支持其最新作品《失落星船：马拉松》上，而该作已导致Bungie的母公司索尼遭受了巨额亏损。

paragraphs.en: Destiny fans have been incredibly upset since the news broke, even going as far to demand a third game during Summer Game Fest . Unfortunately, Destiny 3 doesn't appear to be in the cards as Bloomberg reports that a new game isn't in active development. Additionally, Bungie is planning "significant" layoffs , although the company is said to be pitching and prototyping new games in the Destiny universe.
paragraphs.cn: 自消息传出以来，《命运》粉丝们非常沮丧，甚至在夏日游戏节上要求推出第三部游戏。不幸的是，《命运3》似乎不太可能，因为彭博社报道称，一款新游戏并未在积极开发中。此外，Bungie正计划进行「大规模」裁员，尽管据说该公司正在推介和原型化《命运》宇宙中的新游戏。

paragraphs.en: The cost to make such a game is likely too high given Bungie's financial woes and it wouldn't release until the early 2030s. But stranger things have happened, so maybe Destiny 3 could happen one day. It just won't be anytime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到Bungie的财务困境，制作这样一款游戏的成本可能过高，而且它要到2030年代初才会发布。但更奇怪的事情也发生过，所以也许《命运3》有朝一日会成为现实。只是不会很快。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
